# Hockey Refresh

> Hockey Refresh is a field hockey news and information platform covering international and national league competitions worldwide.

## What we cover

- **FIH International** — World Cup, FIH Pro League, Champions Trophy, and all major international tournaments
- **EuroHockey** — European Championships and club competitions
- **National leagues** — Netherlands (Hoofdklasse), Great Britain, Australia, Germany, Belgium, Spain, Argentina, Ireland, Scotland, India
- **Live scores and fixtures** — results and upcoming matches from FIH, EuroHockey, and national leagues
- **Video highlights** — Hoofdklasse (men and women) and FIH match highlights

## Key pages

- Homepage with latest news, scores and highlights: https://www.hockeyrefresh.com
- All articles: https://www.hockeyrefresh.com/sitemap.xml
- Video highlights: https://www.hockeyrefresh.com/videos
- Competition results and fixtures: https://www.hockeyrefresh.com/competition
- Country pages: /netherlands, /great-britain, /australia, /germany, /belgium, /spain, /argentina, /ireland, /scotland, /india

## Content

All articles are original, professionally written English field hockey journalism sourced from national federations and rewritten for an international audience. Articles include structured data (NewsArticle schema).

## Contact

Website: https://www.hockeyrefresh.com
